✨ AI-Powered Curriculum

Systems Literacy Curriculum

Transform how students understand themselves and the world. A K-12 curriculum built on the principle: "You are not a lone creature — you are a living process inside other living processes."

Our Philosophy

The Vision

"

"You are not a lone creature being bossed around by morality; you are a living process inside other living processes, and learning to see that is both an introduction to science and an introduction to code."

Self as System

Understand yourself as a dynamic process, not a fixed essence.

Life as Computation

See biology as information processing and feedback loops.

Society as Systems

Recognize how families, institutions, and cultures emerge.

Code as Literacy

Programming as a language for understanding process.

What's Included

What You Get

📚

BC + CSTA Aligned

Every lesson maps to British Columbia curriculum and Computer Science standards.

🎨

First Peoples Integration

Indigenous perspectives woven throughout with respect and authenticity.

♿

3-Level Differentiation

Support, guided, and extension activities for every learner.

🎮

p5.js Simulations

Interactive code-based visualizations for every topic.

👨‍👩‍👧

Family Guides

Take-home resources for parent engagement.

📊

Real-Time Dashboard

Track pipeline progress and curriculum generation.
